title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, with proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR. Deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise needed, plus strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating across time zones including the Tel Aviv HQ. A strategic, analytical problem-solver with a builder's mentality. Finout is a cloud cost management company backed by $85M+ in funding, with 100+ employees.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: Head of Revenue Operations role aligns perfectly with target title, 15+ years vastly exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS + Fintech expertise directly relevant to cloud cost management, proven scaling experience, Salesforce expertise, and Tel Aviv location is ideal fit.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of you—the combination of scaling a GTM engine in a well-funded B2B SaaS company while building RevOps from the ground up in a FinTech/infrastructure space is exactly the kind of challenge your background is built for. With your 15+ years navigating high-growth B2B SaaS and deep Salesforce expertise, you'd be uniquely positioned to architect Finout's revenue operations backbone as they scale beyond their current stage. The Tel Aviv HQ base is a bonus—I thought this was worth flagging directly.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, with deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, sales territories, and segmentation. Strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), plus proficiency in Salesforce and territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan. You'll partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions and maintain accurate territory mapping in CRM systems.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with deep Salesforce expertise and GTM strategy background align perfectly with this role's territory strategy and data-driven operations focus. The seniority level, analytical skillset, and sales operations experience make this an excellent match, with only minor uncertainty around specific territory management tools (Fullcast/Pigment/Anaplan).
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building scalable RevOps functions in B2B SaaS, and I'm impressed by Gong's approach to embedding data-driven territory strategy into revenue operations. Your focus on seller productivity through intelligent territory design aligns with how I've helped companies optimize pipeline forecasting and sales capacity planning at scale. I'd love to explore how my experience in Salesforce-centric GTM operations and go-to-market scaling could accelerate your territory optimization initiatives.

title: GTM RevOps Engineer
description: A software engineering mindset applied to the high-stakes world of B2B sales. You'll design automated workflows across prospecting, lead enrichment, scoring, routing, and follow-up sequences, and build integrations across the GTM tech stack (HubSpot, sales engagement, Clay, ZoomInfo). Requires familiarity with no-code/low-code platforms (Make, n8n, Zapier, Workato), data enrichment tools, and demonstrated comfort with LLMs and AI tooling. This is not a CRM admin role—they want someone who writes code, builds integrations, and architects net-new systems. Reports to the Revenue Team Leader, working cross-functionally with BDRs, AEs, Marketing, and Leadership.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS GTM focus, and HubSpot/Salesforce stack experience. Primary gap: the role emphasizes engineering/coding capability (Make, n8n, custom integrations) which isn't explicitly confirmed in Omri's profile, though senior RevOps leaders typically bridge this skillset.
ai_opener: Omri here—your GTM RevOps Engineer role caught my attention because I've spent 15+ years architecting revenue operations in B2B SaaS, and I recognize exactly what you're building: a system where RevOps moves beyond CRM admin into engineering-grade automation and integration design. I've led HubSpot and Salesforce implementations with complex multi-tool orchestration, and I'm particularly drawn to your stack (Clay, ZoomInfo, sales engagement workflows) and the AI-native approach—this is the future of GTM, and I'd love to explore if my track record scaling pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV modeling translates to your technical bar.

title: GTM Engineer
description: A technically-minded, creative GTM Engineer joining the Marketing team to scale the go-to-market engine, blending engineering thinking with growth strategy using AI, automation, and data. You'll build LLM-driven content systems, ABM workflows, and scalable marketing experiments, partnering across Marketing, Product, and Sales. Requires familiarity with B2B marketing tech stacks (Salesforce, HubSpot/Marketo, Clearbit, Segment, Outreach), proven ability to design automated GTM workflows with Clay, Zapier, Airops, Make, or Workato, comfort with APIs and webhooks, and a strong analytical mindset. Base salary range $112,800–$141,000 for level 3.
score_reason: Exceptional match for Omri's GTM Engineer target role with direct alignment on B2B SaaS, AI-native systems, marketing tech stack expertise (Salesforce/HubSpot), and automated workflow design. Remote US location is fully acceptable, and the role's blend of technical GTM strategy with automation tools (Zapier, Make, Clay) directly leverages his RevOps/GTM background.
ai_opener: Omri here—I noticed Teleport is building LLM-driven GTM systems with automation at the core, which is exactly the intersection I've been operating at for the past 15 years scaling B2B SaaS revenue engines. Having architected complex Salesforce/HubSpot workflows and ABM automation at scale, I'm genuinely interested in how you're approaching the marketing tech stack modernization and would love to explore how my RevOps/GTM engineering background could accelerate your go-to-market engine.

title: GTM Engineer
description: A member of the Revenue Operations team executing GTM AI and workflow initiatives to scale outbound prospecting and improve productivity of Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success teams. Requires 3–5+ years in Sales, Marketing, Operations, or GTM roles, preferably B2B, with demonstrated success deploying GenAI and workflow tools (lead scoring, intent signals, outbound triggers). Strong data literacy with Salesforce, HubSpot, or other SaaS tools. Experience with Clay or n8n, building agents like Gemini Enterprise, and ability to vibe code internal GTM apps. DISQO offers a flexible hybrid approach with competitive benefits.
score_reason: Exceptional match on GTM engineering, AI-native operations, and B2B SaaS expertise. Omri's 15+ years in RevOps and demonstrated success with workflow automation, Salesforce/HubSpot, and pipeline intelligence directly aligns with DISQO's GenAI-driven GTM scaling mandate.
ai_opener: DISQO's approach to GenAI-powered outbound prospecting and workflow optimization caught my attention—this is exactly where the most sophisticated revenue orgs are headed. With 15+ years building GTM systems at scale and hands-on experience deploying intent signals, lead scoring automation, and sales productivity tools, I've seen firsthand how the right tech stack transforms Revenue Operations. I'd love to explore how we could accelerate DISQO's GTM motion together.

title: Head of Growth
description: Workerbase, an ambitious team building software that digitizes manual work processes, is hiring a Head of Growth. Trusted by Fortune 500 companies like Porsche, Siemens, and Gazelle Bikes, and backed by €10M Series A funding (Point 9, Almaz Capital, Porsche Ventures). You'll take full ownership of the growth strategy spanning acquisition, activation, retention, and revenue. Drive measurable impact from inbound funnels to outbound experiments—testing, iterating, and scaling campaigns that fuel revenue. Shape the growth playbook by defining and optimizing the entire funnel from first touch to customer expansion, setting the standards for how the company scales.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Head of Growth title, B2B SaaS enterprise context (Fortune 500 clients), and GTM/growth strategy expertise. Moderate concern: role emphasizes full-stack growth (inbound + outbound + campaigns) rather than pure RevOps/pipeline focus, and no fintech/AI-native signals in the listing.
ai_opener: Workerbase's focus on digitizing manual processes for enterprise clients like Porsche and Siemens resonates with my 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM engines. I've built repeatable growth playbooks across acquisition and retention—particularly in complex sales cycles—and I'm intrigued by how you're scaling from Series A momentum. I'd explore how RevOps discipline and data-driven funnel architecture could accelerate your expansion motion.

score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps/GTM expertise, fintech background, and growth systems experience. Remote location and YC-backed venture stage are ideal fits, though Head of Growth may skew slightly more product/marketing-focused than pure RevOps.
ai_opener: Thera's focus on systematic experimentation across the growth funnel resonates with RevOps-driven GTM—I've spent 15+ years building scalable revenue systems for B2B SaaS and fintech, where data-driven activation and retention motions directly impact revenue trajectory. title: Marketing Operations Manager, Campaign Ops
description: Reporting to the Director of Marketing Operations, you'll bring marketing campaigns to life with flawless execution across the marketing automation platform, working with Demand Generation, Lifecycle Marketing, and Revenue Operations. Execute campaigns in Marketo or HubSpot including email sends, nurture programs, and segmentation, while managing setup, QA, scheduling, and data integrity. Requires 5–7 years of Marketing Operations experience in B2B SaaS, hands-on experience with HubSpot or Marketo within a broader stack (Salesforce, Outreach, LeanData, Chili Piper, RevSure), plus strong campaign execution and data management skills. Fully remote permanent position.

Better suited as a stepping stone or if reframed as a strategic operations partnership, but likely overqualified.
